raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California includes 10 million dollars in its state budget to support the College of Indigenous Nations of California (CINC).",
    "CINC aims to become the first federally accredited tribal university in California.",
    "The funding for CINC is intended to expand access to culturally-based higher education for both Native and non-Native students.",
    "CINC is actively working towards full federal accreditation.",
    "California does not currently have a fully accredited tribal university despite having the largest Indigenous population in the country.",
    "There are approximately 40 tribal colleges and universities (TCUs) recognized by the federal government in the United States.",
    "TCUs play significant roles in preserving native languages, strengthening cultural identity, and supporting tribal self-governance.",
    "The 10 million dollars in state support will help CINC expand its academic programs and infrastructure."
  ]
}
```
